facebook.caption: If you're looking for a resort that combines relaxed island living with a full entertainment complex, Phu Quoc Marina at Marina Bãi Trường is worth a serious look. Rated 4.5/5 by guests, this integrated resort sits right along one of Phu Quoc's most scenic coastal stretches, giving you easy access to the beach alongside the amenities of a large resort complex. It's a strong choice for travelers who want more than just a room, whether that means dining, leisure facilities, or simply a polished base for island exploration. Tip: ask about sunset-facing room options when you book.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun drop behind the South China Sea from the grounds of Phu Quoc Marina. The clips show off the scale of this integrated complex at Marina Bãi Trường, from the waterfront atmosphere to the resort facilities that keep guests busy well past check-in. A 4.5-star experience on one of Phu Quoc's best coastal corridors.

instagram.caption: Big resort energy, island pace. Phu Quoc Marina at Marina Bãi Trường earns its 4.5/5 with a full integrated complex right on the coast. A polished, well-rounded stay for those who want it all in one place. Pro tip: request a sunset-facing room.
instagram.video_caption: The waterfront, the facilities, the Phu Quoc golden hour. Phu Quoc Marina at Marina Bãi Trường shows you exactly why integrated resort living on this island just works.

tiktok.caption: This integrated resort on Marina Bãi Trường might just be your perfect Phu Quoc base. 4.5/5 and it shows. #PhuQuocMarina #PhuQuocResort #VietnamTravel #PhuQuocVietnam
